item.title: willocallaghan: Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 18min Hope I’m wrong, but fully expecting Eddie Hearn to come out of these talks sayi
item.description:
Will O'Callaghan @willocallaghan · 18min Hope I’m wrong, but fully expecting Eddie Hearn to come out of these talks saying a deal couldn’t be reached, and he tried everything etc
Can’t see Croke Park dropping their price, nor the government funding to minimise the risk for Matchroom. 2 589

item.title:
LaobhaoiseNihE: Score Beo reposteó L. NíhEanacháin @LaobhaoiseNihE · 3h Cracking goal from the brilliant Kobe McDonald. @MayoGAA
#may
item.description:

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 37min Conor O’Neill’s stoppage time goal that snatched victory for Tyrone over Derry in th
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 37min Conor O’Neill’s stoppage time goal that snatched victory for Tyrone over Derry in the Ulster U20 championship tonight
Tyrone had one foot over the cliff midway through the second half but Derry couldn’t push them off it 2 1 41 4 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 40min INTERVIEW: @Galway_GAA captain Darren Morrissey talks about exciting new players in the
item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 40min INTERVIEW: @Galway_GAA captain Darren Morrissey talks about exciting new players in the panel, Micheál Donoghue's contribution, and Saturday's crucial @gaaleinster SHC clash against @KilkennyCLG at Pearse Stadium #GAA
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-galway-1 … 2 2 mil

item.title:
Score_Beo: Score Beo @Score_Beo · 44min The champs live on
An injury-time goal from Conor O’Neill ensured that the reigning Ulster
